text:
70.2 - Counting Visits Under the Hospital and Medical Plans 
(Rev. 10438, Issued: 11-06-20, Effective: 03-01-20, Implementation: 01- 11-21) 

A. Visit Defined 

A visit is an episode of personal contact with the patient by staff of the HHA, or others 
under arrangements with the HHA, for the purpose of providing a covered home health 
service. Though visits are provided under the HH benefit as part of 30-day periods, and 
periods are unlimited, each visit must be uniquely billed as a separate
